titleStmt.title: SII 26.553: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 553. (A.R. No. 523 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Kulaśēkharadēva: Ś, 1395 and year 2+42, Makara (Tai) 7, śu. 15, Monday, Puṇarpūśam = 1474 A.D., January 3.

summary.p: This inscription is engraved in Tamil and Grantha characters.

It refers to the various items of temple building work including the building of the main shrine from upāna to stūpi and gōpura of the temple of the god Viśvanātha in Dakshiṇa-kāśi (Teṉkāśi) on the northern bank of the Chitrānadī in Teṉṉāri nāḍu, done in former days by Arikēsari Parākrama-pāṇḍyan and to the building of an Olakka-maṇḍapa (i.e., the hall of audience) by Aḻagaṉ-Perumāḷ alias Kulaśēkaradēvaṉ in his own name. It records also the grant of lands and house-sites as iṟaiyili to three Brāhmaṇas appointed to look after some specified item of worship and service in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu saṇḍāryya metat sattam samasta suramaulibhiḥ śāsanam viśva nāthasya śambhorjjayati śāśvatya . Aradicaṇḍeśvarājñeyam . śakābtam Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟu Añciṉ meṟcellā niṉṟa nam kumāraṉ kulacekara tevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatiṉ Etir nāṟpattu Iraṇṭāvatu makara ñāyaṟṟu Eḻāntiyatiyum paurṇaiyum somavāramum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ teṉṉārināṭṭu citranadi Uttaratīrattu dakṣiṇakāśiyil muṉṉāḷ nam kumāraṉ harikesari devaṉāṉa parākramapāṇḍyadevan nam
Ālayam Upānādi stūpaāntamum gopurān=tamum maṟṟumuḷḷa Ālaiyaṅkaḷuṅ kuṟaitirttu namakku nityanaimittikaṅkaḷukku veṇṭum paṟṟukkaḷum viṭṭu Arccakar mutalāyuḷḷa kāṇiyāḷaraiyuṅ kaṟpittu naṭantu potukacceyte nam kumāraṉ Aḻakaṉ perumāḷāṉa kulacekaratevaṉ namakku Olakkamaṇṭapamum taṉ perāle paṇiceyvittut tantu Eṭṭāmpaṅku karmadiyāka kāśyapagotrattu bodhāyana sūtrattu śivaśaraṇiśvaramuṭaiyāṉ vikramapāṇḍyabhaṭṭaṉaiyum Oṉpatām paṅku karmmiyāka phāradvāja gotrattu bodhāyana sūtrattu mutaliyāṉa sundarapāṇḍya bhaṭṭaṉaiyum Oṉpatāmpaṅku kkarccakanākak kaṟpitta
kāśyapagotrattu bodhāyana sūtrattu Aḻutakaṇāṟṟiṉāṉ puṣpavana bhaṭṭaṉaiyuṅ kaṟpittu taṉ Olaiyuṅ kuṭuttu nammuṭaiya Olaiyuṅ kuṭukkaveṇum Eṉṟu nammuṭaṉ collukaiyil nāmum nam gauriyuṭaṉ Iruntu Ivvaṉai varaiyuṅ kaṟpittu Eṭṭām paṅku karmmiyākak kaṟpitta śivaśaraṇīśvaramuṭaiyāṉ vikramapāṇḍya bhaṭṭaṉukku viṭṭa pañcaprākāram melaivitiyāṉ kācikku vāyattāṉ perunteruvil meṟciṟaku gaṇapati Ālaiyattukkut teṟkup patiṉ mūṉṟu muḻattiṉāl Iraṇṭāmaṉai Oṉṟum toṭṭak kūṟum Āṟṟaṅkaraiyil toṭṭakkūṟum teṉ
Ārināṭṭuk kuṉṟakkuṭipaṟṟil naṭuviṟ kārpuravil Irupattoraṭikkolāl Ivvāṇṭu pacāṉamutalukku kārpacāṉam payiṟ ceytu koḷḷumpaṭi nam kaṇṭuḻavu tiṟantu Iṟaiyiliyāka Orumā Arainilamum viṭṭu Uṭamai niṅkalāka nāḷ Oṉṟukku Irunāḻi Ariciccoṟum kaṟpittu Oṉpatāmpaṅku karmmiyākakkaṟpitta mutaliyāṉa sundarapāṇḍya bhaṭṭaṉukku viṭṭa pabaprākāramelciṟaku gaṇavati Ālaiyattukkut teṟkuppatiṉoṉṟu muḻattiṉāḷ Añcāmaṉai Oṉṟum toṭṭak kūṟum Āṟṟaṅkaraiyil toṭṭakkūṟu
m teṉ Āriṉāṭṭuk kuṉṟakkuṭippaṟṟil naṭuviṟ kāṟpuravil Irupattoraṭik kolāl Ivvāṇṭu pacāṉamutalukkuk kārpacāṉam payiṟceytukoḷḷumpaṭi nam kaṇṭuḻavu tiṟantu Iṟaiyiliyāka Oru mā Arainilamum viṭṭu Uṭamai nīṅkalāka nāḷ Oṉṟukku Irunāḻi Ariciccoṟum kaṟpittu nam Ālayattilum nam gauri Ālaiyattilum cuṟṟālaiyaṅkaḷilum taṅkaḷ viḻukkāṭu nāḷ Uḷḷatu parikarmmamum naṭatti Arccaṉaik kuṟaikaḷumārāyntu Acaṟ paṅkuk kotta mariyātiyuḷḷa sutaṉ tiraṅkaḷum peṟṟuppotum paṭi namatu Arccakaṉākak kaṟpitta Amutakaṇāṟṟiṇāṉ puṣpavana bhaṭṭaṉukku
viṭṭa pañcaprākāram mel ciṟaku gaṇavati Ālaiyattukkut teṟkup patiṉmūṉṟu muḻattiṉāl maṉai Oṉṟum toṭṭamum Āṟṟaṅkaraiyil toṭṭakkūṟum teṉṉāri nāṭṭuk kuṉṟakkuṭippaṟṟil naṭuviṟ kāṟpuravil Irupattoraṭik kolāl Ivvāṇṭu pacāṉa mutalukku kārpācāṉam payir ceytu koḷḷumpaṭi nam kaṇṭuḻavutiṟantu Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭanilam Oru mā Araiyum kaiyāṇṭu taṉ viḻukkāṭu nāḷ Uḷḷatu nammaiyum nam gauriyaiyum Arccittu cuṟṟālayaṅkaḷum Accittu Acaṟ paṅkukkuotta mariyāti nam Ālayaṅkaḷilum cuṟṟālayaṅkaḷilum Uḷḷa Ubha
ya(nta)ṅkaḷum sutantraṅkaḷum peṟṟup potum paṭiyum kaṟpitta Aḷavukku Im mariyātiyile Iṉṉāḷ mutalukku Ivvolai piṭipāṭāka maṉaikaḷum toṭṭak kūṟukaḷum Iṟaiyiliyum kaiyāṇṭu coṟum maṟṟuḷḷa cavuntiraṅkaḷum peṟṟuk kaṟpitta mariyāti Uḷḷatu Ekkuṟaikaḷum tirantu nam Ālaiyam Uḷḷaḷavum san=tati praveśame kāṇiyāṭcaiyāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭik kaiyāṇṭu koḷḷavum pāṟka Ivai veḷiyāṟṟūr Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu § Ādicaṇḍeśvaran Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.553 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
